name: medical billing offices processing 10–20 payroll submissions/month tool
description: For medical billing offices processing 10–20 payroll submissions/month, manual data entry causes late payroll submissions. We automate timesheet data extraction instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
target_audience: medical billing offices processing 10–20 payroll submissions/month
problem_solved: manual data entry errors and time consumption in payroll submissions
